top_signals.title: Oil prices turn lower after Iran says U.S. talks could be pursued based on national interests
top_signals.summary: The U.S. has bombed Iran for nine consecutive nights in retaliation for repeated attacks on oil tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Drone Strike Halts Exports at Strategic Black Sea Oil Terminal
top_signals.summary: A drone struck a tanker loading crude oil at the Caspian Pipeline Consortium’s (CPC) Black Sea export terminal on Monday, according to regional media reports, forcing the suspension of exports for the second time in less than 24 hours.  The CPC said the tanker NELSA was loading at Single Point Mooring 1 (SPM-1) when the drone hit the vessel’s starboard aft section, igniting a fire on deck and in compartments between the accommodation block and engine room. Emergency crews extinguished the fire within hours; the tanker remained…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: IREN jumps 16% after raising AI cloud revenue target above $4B
top_signals.summary: The Bitcoin miner raised its year-end AI cloud revenue target to more than $4 billion after signing $2.8 billion in new contracts with AI developers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: South Carolina Republicans crowd field to succeed Sen. Lindsey Graham
top_signals.summary: Rep. Russell Fry became the latest South Carolina Republican to launch a campaign to succeed the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
